resultList.dtldesc: Experience luxurious living in this expansive 3 BHK apartment located in the prestigious ATS Tourmaline, Sector 109, Gurgaon. Offering a blend of comfort, style, and convenience, this property is ideal for families seeking a modern lifestyle in a prime location.Property SpecificationsThis ready-to-move-in apartment spans a super built-up area of 2,585 sq. ft. and is situated on the 7th floor of a 27-storey building. The apartment features three bedrooms, four bathrooms, and four balconies, providing ample space and natural light. The layout includes a family lounge and a servant room, enhancing the functionality of the living space. The unit is unfurnished, allowing you the flexibility to design and furnish the interiors to your taste. The apartment is part of a premium tower within the complex, offering panoramic views of the surrounding areas.FacilitiesResidents of ATS Tourmaline enjoy a range of world-class amenities, including a swimming pool, gymnasium, jogging track, outdoor tennis courts, and a clubhouse. The gated community ensures 247 security, providing a safe and secure environment for families. Additional facilities include a laundry service, house help accommodation, and a private pool. The apartment comes with two covered parking spaces, ensuring convenience for residents with multiple vehicles.LocalitySituated in Sector 109, Gurgaon, ATS Tourmaline offers excellent connectivity to major parts of the city. The Dwarka Expressway is in close proximity, facilitating easy access to Delhi and other key areas. The locality is well-served by public transport, making commuting hassle-free. Residents have easy access to a variety of civic amenities, including supermarkets, retail outlets, banks, and ATMs, ensuring daily necessities are within reach. The area also boasts proximity to educational institutions, healthcare centres, and entertainment hubs, adding to the convenience of living in this area.This 3 BHK apartment in ATS Tourmaline, Sector 109, Gurgaon, offers a harmonious blend of luxury, comfort, and convenience, making it an excellent choice for those seeking a modern living space in a prime location.
